name: Coconut Shrimp B1
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each shrimp in half lengthwise.
2. Place the shredded coconut in a shallow bowl.
3. Prepare the batter: In a small bowl, combine the egg, milk, and sugar, beating until well blended. Gradually work in the flour, beating with a rotary mixer until smooth.
4. Heat 1 inch of oil in a pan to 375°F (190°C).
5. Dip each shrimp half in the egg mixture, then in the coconut, ensuring it is thoroughly coated.
6. Fry in hot oil for 5 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Reheat in a 350°F (175°C) oven for 5 minutes if desired; serve hot.
The best shrimp to use for this recipe are medium-sized, which come 20 to a pound. The shrimp can be fried in a wok, deep saucepan, or electric frying pan.
